main.subtitle: Take control of your financial life with our comprehensive suite of tools designed for simplicity and power. Track, save, and grow your wealth.
main.featuresTitle: Everything you need to master your money
main.featuresSubtitle: Balio provides a complete 360-degree view of your financial health with intuitive tools.
main.feat1Desc: Automatically categorize expenses and visualize your spending habits over time.
main.feat2Desc: Keep track of all your accounts (cash, bank...) and check your balance in real time.
main.feat3Desc: Set financial objectives and track your progress to reach them ahead of schedule.
main.feat4Desc: Visualize your wealth growth and discover trends with interactive charts.
main.ctaSubtitle: Join others who are mastering their money with Balio today.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your details to access your dashboard.
auth.passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase and 1 number
